title: Red Cross Book Scans
wikitext:
[]: Red Cross Book Scans             Quote Post by travis » Mon Aug 02, 2004 8:01 pm I have a copy of the RCB that Aaron wouldn't let me give him, so assuming I was to hand it over to one of you, what would you pay for it? I may just do that. But regardless, I thought I'd treat you to a few scans: In order: 1) The cover! 2) Part of the glossary/dictionary of EVA section! that shows 'Absolute Terror Field' once again. :P 3) Part of a catalog section that shows lots of EVA merch. 4) Part of the image before a section that's basically a synopsis of 'Air' 5) A photograph accompanying an interview with Kazuya Tsurumaki Cheers!

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Mon Aug 02, 2004 8:22 pm Yah! A screenshot of Shinji and his infamous right hand!

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Aug 02, 2004 8:45 pm Well what did you pay for it? I would feel bad if I offered to pay like 20$ and it cost you 100$.

[]:             Quote Post by travis » Mon Aug 02, 2004 8:49 pm I don't really remember how much I paid for it. . .it was somewhere in the mid-range, I'd say. It's a softcover full-color Japanese book, so it was semi-expensive. I know it was less than 70$. I promise not to rip anyone off. I'm just getting a general concensus right now.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaPimp » Mon Aug 02, 2004 9:07 pm Is there anyway you could make hi-res scans of this?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Aug 02, 2004 10:14 pm I'll give you 2 bucks for it.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Aug 03, 2004 2:04 am This cat looks like mine.

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Tue Aug 03, 2004 4:04 am It looks cool. Who's holding the cat? And how much you want for it .

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Tue Aug 03, 2004 6:25 am Wow! So that's the fabled Red Cross Book, eh? Coolness!!!! 5) A photograph accompanying an interview with Kazuya Tsurumaki

[]:             Quote Post by Crazyman42 » Tue Aug 03, 2004 7:20 pm That is the sexiest thing I have ever seen, other than Shinji with breasts.

[]: Wow!             Quote Post by Olin of Xephon » Tue Aug 03, 2004 9:28 pm I'll pay thirty. And if you want, I'll pay the shipping charge. Exactly how big is it? And how many pages?

[]:             Quote Post by kosure » Tue Aug 03, 2004 9:30 pm Wow travis. thats cool, thanks for the peek!

[]: High-res Scans!!             Quote Post by travis » Tue Aug 03, 2004 10:17 pm Kazuya Tsurumaki is holding the kitty. Assistant Director on Evangelion. Anyway, for those who wanted to see them: High-Res Scan-scan of Kazuya and the Kitty High-Res Scan-scan of the Cover High-Res Scan-scan of Mr.Anno in the Studio NEW!! High-Res Scan-scan of a page showing screen caps from the oft-rumored Live Action bit NEW!! High-Res Scan-scan of a page showing screen caps from the Unit 02 v. MP Eva battle NEW!! If there's anything you specifically want to see in the book, say so. Stats: 42 pages + both covers + full-color + all glossy print Japanese Price: 800 yen (or roughly 7.90 US) What I Paid For It: 60.15 US (found receipt) Released: July 19th 1997 --- I haven't decided to sell quite yet, just getting a general idea of what I could get for it. I'm moving to college soon, and I'll need money. If I have to sell it, it'd be here first. Also: Screenshots for Evangelion 2 for PS2 coming soon, or at least scans of the instruction booklet and full packaging.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Tue Aug 03, 2004 10:31 pm Cool , doesnt look bad

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Tue Aug 03, 2004 10:41 pm Wow.... a 1000% mark up... thats sad....

[]:             Quote Post by OZKai » Fri Nov 13, 2009 12:05 am I've posted a (near) complete scanlation of the RCB on my flickr page. You can find it here: The End of Evangelion Theatrical Program http://www.flickr.com/photos/ozkai/sets/72157620985064665/
summary: []: Red Cross Book Scans             Quote Post by travis » Mon Aug 02, 2004 8:01 pm I have a copy of the RCB that Aaron wouldn't let me give him, so assuming I was to hand it over to one of you, what would you pay for it? I may just do that. But regardless, I thought I'd treat you to a few scans: In order: 1) The cover! 2) Part of the glossary/dictionary of EVA section! that shows 'Absolute Terror Field' once again.
